name: Kevin's Irish Soda Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 4 cups of the flour with the remaining ingredients with a fork until mixed.
2. Sprinkle 1/4 cup of flour on a board and turn out dough. Knead flour in until it forms a smooth dough. (Add more flour as needed).
3. Grease a 9-inch round skillet or cake pan, dust with flour, then press loaf into pan. Cut a 1/2 inch deep cross in top of loaf.
4. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until it sounds hollow.
5. Remove from pan to a wire rack; rub with butter and sprinkle with sugar.
6. Cool completely.
